name: Butternut Burrito-ch
recipeIngredient: 1 can enchilada sauce, red or green
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Saute onion and garlic in a little oil until translucent.
3. Mash the cooked butternut squash.
4. Add mashed squash, herbs (oregano, cumin), and Tamari soy sauce to the sauted onion and garlic. Mix well over low heat until flavors blend.
5. Taste and add more herbs or extra Julienned Jalepeno peppers if desired.
6. Fill tortillas with the mixture and roll them up.
7. Cover with enchilada sauce and bake for 30 minutes.
